category_sources: Official InfluxData Flux documentation describes Flux as an open source functional data scripting language for querying, analyzing, and acting on data.
source_facts.description says it is a lightweight scripting language for querying databases.
display_name_sources: Official InfluxData documentation uses Flux documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official InfluxData Flux product page.
docs_sources: Official docs.influxdata.com Flux documentation is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/influxdata/flux, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Flux documentation mentions time series databases, SQL databases, CSV, querying, analysis, and data scripting.
source_facts.description identifies database querying language use.
